== Night Vision Eye ==
The fundus of the eye is in the shape of a concave mirror, and there are more rod cells that respond sensitively to faint light, all of which allow the eye to have good night vision!

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=Night Vision Eye
|Rarity=green
|ID Number=4
|Initial HP=10
|HP Increase=0
|Initial ATK=0
|ATK Increase=0
|Initial DEF=0
|DEF Increase=0
|Initial RUSH=2
|RUSH Increase=0
|Effect 1=When exploring, CRIT +5%
|Initial Effect Value 1=
|Effect Value Increase 1=
|Effect 2=
|Initial Effect Value 2=
|Effect Value Increase 2=
|Effect 3=
|Initial Effect Value 3=
|Effect Value Increase 3=
|Effect 4=
|Initial Effect Value 4=
|Effect Value Increase 4=
|}}

== Source ==
Starting Evolution

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Green Organs]]
__NOTOC__
